installConfigs.instructions: Remote Cloudflare MCP server for managing Workers bindings (KV, R2, D1, Durable Objects). No API key is required: on first connection Theia opens a browser to authorize access to your Cloudflare account via OAuth. Cloudflare also offers additional specialized remote servers (e.g. observability, builds, radar, browser) under *.mcp.cloudflare.com — change the serverUrl to use those instead.

Remote Cloudflare MCP server for managing Workers bindings (KV, R2, D1, Durable Objects). No API key is required: on first connection Theia opens a browser to authorize access to your Cloudflare account via OAuth. Cloudflare also offers additional specialized remote servers (e.g. observability, builds, radar, browser) under *.mcp.cloudflare.com — change the serverUrl to use those instead.
